content: Zero-shot prompting can be reframed as a lightweight, implicit agent-orchestrated answering ensemble, where the LLM’s pre-trained specialized capabilities (acquired during pretraining) are dynamically coordinated by the zero-shot prompt to generate a response, rather than relying on explicitly defined specialized agents coded into the ensemble. This eliminates the need to pre-register and configure separate specialized agents for common tasks by leveraging the LLM’s existing latent specialization.
